_notes.provider: openai | anthropic. 'openai' covers any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (OpenAI, OpenCode Zen, OpenRouter, LM Studio, Ollama).
_notes.baseUrl: Leave blank to use the provider default. For OpenCode Zen / OpenRouter / a local LLM, paste their base URL (ending in /v1 for OpenAI-compatible).
_notes.model: e.g. gpt-4o-mini, claude-3-5-sonnet-latest, or your OpenCode model id.
